/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/VulkanFramework2D.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/VulkanFramework2D.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanFramework2D.dir/src/Logs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanFramework2D.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanFramework2D.dir/src/VulkanInstance.cpp.o -o VulkanFramework2D  /lib/libvulkan.so -lvulkan /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libSDL3.so.0.5.0 /usr/lib/libglm.a
